## Summary

Describe the user or developer problem and the resulting behavior.

## Validation

- [ ] Added or updated focused tests
- [ ] Ran `pnpm check`
- [ ] Tested Chromium behavior, or documented why it was not required
- [ ] Tested Firefox behavior, or documented why it was not required

## Review considerations

- [ ] No permission, host-access, CSP, external-messaging, or web-accessible-resource change
- [ ] No automatic navigation, remote lookup, persistence, or sensitive logging
- [ ] Accessibility, contrast, text scaling, and reduced motion were considered for UI changes
- [ ] Compatibility claims are backed by maintained fixtures
- [ ] Product, architecture, security, QA, and contributor documentation remain accurate

## Visual evidence

For UI changes, attach a synthetic screenshot or short recording in light and dark mode. Do not include sensitive page content or QR payloads.
